name: Opening Our Relationship
description: Exploring some form of consensual non-monogamy together — dating, playing, or connecting with others beyond your partnership.

name: Swinging or Playing Together
description: Sexual experiences with others that you share as a couple — same room, same event, together.

name: Dating Separately
description: Each partner having the freedom to go on dates or form connections with others independently.

name: Polyamory — Loving More Than One
description: The possibility of developing deep romantic love with more than one person, with everyone's knowledge and consent.

name: Our Relationship Comes First
description: Maintaining a clear hierarchy where your partnership is the 'primary' relationship, and other connections come second.

name: Emotional Connections With Others
description: Forming meaningful emotional bonds — not just sexual ones — with people outside your partnership.

name: New Relationship Energy (NRE)
description: The excitement and intensity that comes with a new connection — the butterflies, the constant texting, the giddiness.

name: Your Partner Falling in Love
description: The possibility that your partner could develop deep romantic feelings for another person.

name: Group Sexual Experiences
description: Sexual experiences involving more than two people — threesomes, moresomes, or group play.

name: Safer Sex Boundaries
description: Having clear agreements about protection, testing, and barriers with outside partners — and sticking to them.

name: Overnight Stays With Others
description: The possibility of you or your partner spending the night at someone else's place after a date or encounter.

name: Time and Attention
description: How you divide your time — evenings, weekends, trips — when other connections are part of your life.

name: Veto Power
description: Either partner having the ability to say 'no' to a specific person or situation, and that decision is final.

name: Full Disclosure — Knowing Everything
description: Wanting to hear all the details about your partner's experiences with others — what happened, how it felt, what they enjoyed.

name: Meeting Your Partner's Other Connections
description: Getting to know the people your partner dates or is involved with — meeting metamours, sharing social time, or building a broader community.

name: Who Knows About Us
description: Being open with friends, family, or your community about practicing non-monogamy.

name: Handling Jealousy Together
description: Working through jealous feelings as a team — seeing jealousy as information, not a crisis.
